title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
summary: Google announces community investments in Virginia to create local jobs and improve energy affordability through infrastructure and workforce development.
chinese_summary: 谷歌宣布在弗吉尼亚州进行社区投资，通过基础设施和劳动力发展创造本地就业机会并提高能源可负担性。
